CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'foo'), (2, 'bar'), (3, 'baz');
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE value = 'bar';
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value LIKE 'b%');
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM test_table));
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_table);
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE id BETWEEN 1 AND 3;
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM AnotherTable WHERE AnotherTable.id = test_table.id);
CREATE TABLE AnotherTable (id UInt32, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO AnotherTable VALUES (4, 'qux'), (5, 'quux');
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM AnotherTable WHERE AnotherTable.id = test_table.id);
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value = 'foo') as temp);
ALTER TABLE test_table DELETE WHERE value = 'baz';
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE id = 2 AND value = 'bar';
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE value IN (SELECT description FROM AnotherTable);
CREATE TABLE ComplexTable (id UInt32, parent_id UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO ComplexTable VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 1), (3, 1), (4, 2);
DELETE FROM ComplexTable WHERE parent_id IN (SELECT id FROM ComplexTable WHERE parent_id IS NULL);
DELETE FROM ComplexTable WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM ComplexTable WHERE parent_id IS NOT NULL AND id < 4);
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value = 'nonexistent');
